title: XDG_CONFIG_HOME ignored on linux
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**
The XDG_CONFIG_HOME environment variable is ignored
<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

```
export XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp/podman/local
export XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/podman/config
pkill podman
rm -rf $HOME/.local/share/containers $HOME/.config/containers/ $XDG_DATA_HOME $XDG_CONFIG_HOME
mkdir $XDG_DATA_HOME
mkdir $XDG_CONFIG_HOME
tree   $HOME/.local/share/containers $HOME/.config/containers/ $XDG_DATA_HOME $XDG_CONFIG_HOME
podman info
tree   $HOME/.local/share/containers $HOME/.config/containers/ $XDG_DATA_HOME $XDG_CONFIG_HOME

```
**Describe the results you received:**

```
% export XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp/podman/local
% export XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/podman/config
% pkill podman
% rm -rf $HOME/.local/share/containers $HOME/.config/containers/ $XDG_DATA_HOME $XDG_CONFIG_HOME
% mkdir $XDG_DATA_HOME
% mkdir $XDG_CONFIG_HOME
% tree   $HOME/.local/share/containers $HOME/.config/containers/ $XDG_DATA_HOME $XDG_CONFIG_HOME
/home/dj/.local/share/containers [error opening dir]
/home/dj/.config/containers/ [error opening dir]
/tmp/podman/local
/tmp/podman/config

0 directories, 0 files
% podman info
host:
  BuildahVersion: 1.14.2
  CgroupVersion: v1
  Conmon:
    package: 'conmon: /usr/libexec/podman/conmon'
    path: /usr/libexec/podman/conmon
    version: 'conmon version 2.0.11, commit: '
  Distribution:
    distribution: debian
    version: "10"
  IDMappings:
    gidmap:
    - container_id: 0
      host_id: 1000
      size: 1
    - container_id: 1
      host_id: 100000
      size: 65536
    uidmap:
    - container_id: 0
      host_id: 1000
      size: 1
    - container_id: 1
      host_id: 100000
      size: 65536
  MemFree: 255942656
  MemTotal: 8261079040
  OCIRuntime:
    name: runc
    package: 'runc: /usr/sbin/runc'
    path: /usr/sbin/runc
    version: |-
      runc version 1.0.0~rc6+dfsg1
      commit: 1.0.0~rc6+dfsg1-3
      spec: 1.0.1
  SwapFree: 9951842304
  SwapTotal: 9999216640
  arch: amd64
  cpus: 4
  eventlogger: journald
  hostname: fern
  kernel: 4.19.0-8-amd64
  os: linux
  rootless: true
  slirp4netns:
    Executable: /usr/bin/slirp4netns
    Package: 'slirp4netns: /usr/bin/slirp4netns'
    Version: |-
      slirp4netns version 0.4.3
      commit: unknown
  uptime: 8h 13m 41.47s (Approximately 0.33 days)
registries:
  search:
  - docker.io
  - quay.io
store:
  ConfigFile: /home/dj/.config/containers/storage.conf
  ContainerStore:
    number: 0
  GraphDriverName: vfs
  GraphOptions: {}
  GraphRoot: /tmp/podman/local/containers/storage
  GraphStatus: {}
  ImageStore:
    number: 0
  RunRoot: /run/user/1000/containers
  VolumePath: /tmp/podman/local/containers/storage/volumes

% tree   $HOME/.local/share/containers $HOME/.config/containers/ $XDG_DATA_HOME $XDG_CONFIG_HOME
/home/dj/.local/share/containers [error opening dir]
/home/dj/.config/containers/
└── storage.conf
/tmp/podman/local
└── containers
    └── storage
        ├── libpod
        │   └── bolt_state.db
        ├── mounts
        ├── storage.lock
        ├── tmp
        ├── vfs
        ├── vfs-containers
        │   └── containers.lock
        ├── vfs-images
        │   └── images.lock
        └── vfs-layers
            └── layers.lock
/tmp/podman/config

9 directories, 6 files
% 

```

**Describe the results you expected:**

I expected that the configuration directory would be  `$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/containers`, i.e., `/tmp/podman/config/containers` and that the storage configuration file would be written there.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:            1.8.1
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.11.6
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```

  SwapFree: 9951842304

    Version: |-
      slirp4netns version 0.4.3
      commit: unknown
  uptime: 8h 11m 15.78s (Approximately 0.33 days)
registries:
  search:
  - docker.io
  - quay.io
store:
  ConfigFile: /home/dj/.config/containers/storage.conf
  ContainerStore:
    number: 0
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```

podman/unknown 1.8.1~1 arm64

podman/unknown 1.8.1~1 ppc64el

```

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
it is fixed in master, closing the issue
